'''valate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weirdly|weirdly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weirdly|weirdly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| valate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:valate|valate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:valatesher|valatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valatesherĂ«m|valatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:valatero|valatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:valateshĂ«|valateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valateshĂ«m|valateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivalatero|gokivalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivalateshĂ«|gokivalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalateshĂ«m|gokivalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govalankerom|govalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govalankeshĂ«|govalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govalankeshĂ«m|govalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govalankeya|govalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:valaterom|valaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valatemu|valatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:valateya|valateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivalaterom|gokivalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalatemu|gokivalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivalateya|gokivalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:valalate|valalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:valalatesher|valalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valalatesherĂ«m|valalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:valalatero|valalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:valalateshĂ«|valalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valalateshĂ«m|valalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivalalatero|gokivalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivalalateshĂ«|gokivalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalalateshĂ«m|gokivalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govalalankerom|govalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govalalankeshĂ«|govalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govalalankeshĂ«m|govalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govalalankeya|govalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:valalaterom|valalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:valalatemu|valalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:valalateya|valalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivalalaterom|gokivalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivalalatemu|gokivalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivalalateya|gokivalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠte|vĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠtesher|vĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠtero|vĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠlĂŠtero|gokivĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠlĂŠnkerom|govĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠlĂŠnkeya|govĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠterom|vĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠtemu|vĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠlĂŠteya|vĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠlĂŠterom|gokivĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠlĂŠteya|gokivĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vaflafte|vaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vaflaftesher|vaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vaflaftesherĂ«m|vaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vaflaftero|vaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vaflafteshĂ«|vaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vaflafteshĂ«m|vaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivaflaftero|gokivaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivaflafteshĂ«|gokivaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivaflafteshĂ«m|gokivaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govaflafnkerom|govaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govaflafnkeshĂ«|govaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govaflafnkeshĂ«m|govaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govaflafnkeya|govaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vaflafterom|vaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vaflaftemu|vaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vaflafteya|vaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivaflafterom|gokivaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivaflaftemu|gokivaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivaflafteya|gokivaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
